1.name: Series Souvenir: Bookmark
1.reward: Gain +50 Ink Drops and +5 Paper Scraps.

3.name: Series Souvenir: Page Keeper
3.reward: The next two books you complete grant a x1.5 Ink Drop bonus.

6.name: Series Souvenir: Dust Jacket
6.reward: Gain +30 Ink Drops and +10 Paper Scraps.

8.name: Series Souvenir: Bookplate
8.reward: You may remove one Worn Page penalty.

9.name: Series Souvenir: Epilogue
9.reward: Your next 3 books grant x1.5 Ink Drops.

10.name: Series Souvenir: Collector's Edition
10.reward: Gain +80 Ink Drops and +15 Paper Scraps.
